Video.summary: Humans are inclined to take the natural element of water for granted; until they witness its relentless power and destructive capabilities.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water
Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water
Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water

Video.summary: A catastrophic earthquake, a mesmerizing avalanche, a destructive tornado, and an unintentional smashup derby on icy highways; our experts weigh in on these viral videos as people get caught off guard by the sudden and powerful forces of nature.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Off Guard

Video.summary: Humans are inclined to take the natural element of water for granted; until they witness its relentless power and destructive capabilities.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water

Video.summary: Mark hikes up Mount Washington, New Hampshire, the highest peak in the Northeastern US and battles one of the most dangerous mountains in the world at its peak intensity.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Peak Intensity

Video.summary: Storm Chaser Jaclyn Whittal anxiously experiences her first Category 4 Tropical Storm.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Landfall!

Video.summary: Mark hikes up Mount Washington, New Hampshire, the highest peak in the Northeastern US and battles one of the most dangerous mountains in the world at its peak intensity.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Peak Intensity

Video.title: Storm Hunters | Landfall!

Video.title: Storm Hunters | Peak Intensity

Video.summary: From hailstorms to hurricanes and tornadoes, the Storm Hunters revisit their craziest chases and share some of the most amazing moments in extreme weather events.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Best of

Video.summary: The Stormhunters find themselves knee deep in flood waters as historic rainfall threatens to wash them away.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | 1000 Year Storm

Video.summary: Firefighters and survivors share their stories; experts discuss the reality of wildfires.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Not If, But When

Video.summary: While on a routine sightseeing flight, a massive storm has the pilots fighting to keep their passengers safe.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Fight or Flight

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Fight or Flight
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Fight or Flight
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Fight or Flight

Video.summary: Rough seas have a couple of surfers turning to Island Air for an adventure of a life time.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Surf's Up

Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Surf's Up
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Surf's Up

Video.summary: Hunters Adrian Knopps and Garrett Hagen venture into the remotest part of Alaska's Misty Fjord, hunting Moose and Bear. After a successful hunt Adrian finds himself trapped by a twenty foot tidal surge after Garrett fails to return with the skiff.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 1

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 1
Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 1
Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 1

Video.summary: Facing starvation, dehydration and predators from the deep, sailor Steven Callahan fights to survive not only the physical hardships, but also the mental and emotional strain of being adrift and alone in a disintegrating life raft.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Adrift Part 2

Video.summary: Hunters Adrian Knopps and Garrett Hagen venture into the remotest part of Alaska's Misty Fjord, hunting Moose and Bear. After a successful hunt Adrian finds himself trapped by a twenty foot tidal surge after Garrett fails to return with the skiff.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 1

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 1
Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 1
Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 1

Video.summary: Facing starvation, dehydration and predators from the deep, sailor Steven Callahan fights to survive not only the physical hardships, but also the mental and emotional strain of being adrift and alone in a disintegrating life raft.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Adrift Part 2

Video.summary: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore the frigid Canadian arctic in the depths of winter. The team first uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head north through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Arctic Winter
